description: Fix the evaluate_formula tool to clean up the temp cell ZZ9999 even when the read step fails, preventing leftover formulas in the user's workbook.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/excel-online && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Wrap evaluate_formula in try/finally to ensure temp cell cleanup
userStories.description: The write→read→clear sequence in evaluate_formula has no error recovery. If the read step fails, the formula persists in cell ZZ9999.
acceptanceCriteria: The clear operation runs in a finally block that executes regardless of whether the read succeeds or fails
If the clear operation itself fails, the error is not swallowed — it should be logged or included in the response
The tool still returns the correct result on success
